title: work-at Git Repo Surface
description: Fast task-surface health profile for nested git and node/bun repo workspaces.

checks.title: Registered repo path is a git checkout
Registered repo has an origin remote
checks.repairHint: Restore the repo origin remote before using this worker surface for fetch, pull, or push work.

checks.title: Registered repo can read from origin
checks.repairHint: Repair GitHub remote auth on this worker so `git fetch` and `git ls-remote origin` succeed before continuing. Do not fall back to manual patch transfer when this check is red.

checks.title: apply_patch is available on target
checks.repairHint: Expose apply_patch on this worker so repo edits can use a structured patch tool instead of brittle inline shell rewrites.
repairCommand: wrapper_dir=/home/ec2-user/.local/bin; real_apply_patch=$(find /home/ec2-user/.nvm/versions/node -path '*/lib/node_modules/@openai/codex/node_modules/@openai/codex-linux-*/vendor/*/codex/codex' 2>/dev/null | sort | tail -n 1); test -n "$real_apply_patch" && test -x "$real_apply_patch" && mkdir -p "$wrapper_dir" && ln -sfn "$real_apply_patch" "$wrapper_dir/apply_patch"
